name: Space Adventure: Noobiks Battle vs Zombies
description: Introducing Space Adventure: Noobiks Battle vs Zombies, an exciting game where players control a Minecraft Noob on platforms within a space station. In this action-packed game, your mission is to unlock doors by obliterating crystals while fending off waves of cosmic zombies. Explore various levels of the spacecraft, hopping from platform to platform, collecting weapons, and power-ups to combat the enemies. Each platform presents a unique challenge, with new obstacles and crystals to destroy in order to progress and unveil the next door.
instructions: Keywords A - Left D - Right W - Up S - Down amp Mouse - Fire
